ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "student_roll_number" TEXT /* Student's roll number or unique identifier at the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the student resides */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university where the student is enrolled */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the student is enrolled */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university where the department is located */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to complete the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course was taken */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the course was taken */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned for the course */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point earned for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "transcript_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was generated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transcript (e.g., official, unofficial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
